domain: healthcare, mental health, workplace wellness, survey analysis
description: This dataset contains survey responses about mental health in the technology workplace, including demographics, treatment history, family history, work interference, employer support, benefits, anonymity, leave policies, and attitudes toward discussing mental and physical health at work. The local CSV currently contains 1,259 rows and 27 columns, making it suitable for mental health analytics, workplace policy analysis, and retrieval over employee survey patterns. It contains 1,259 rows and 27 columns in CSV format.
